nodes.label: ActiveRagdoll.cs
nodes.rationale: Two skeletons (invisible target pose + rigid physics parts joined by ConfigurableJoints). Pelvis hard-locked upright while grounded so the striker cannot fall over; jumping or reclining releases the lock so the body can leave the ground and tip.

nodes.label: GameBootstrap
nodes.rationale: Whole game builds itself at runtime via [RuntimeInitializeOnLoadMethod] so nothing needs wiring in the scene; works from an empty scene.

nodes.label: KickDetector.cs
nodes.rationale: A leg-ball contact only counts as a bicycle kick if it lands while reclining and the torso is tipped well back; otherwise it is just a physical knock.

nodes.label: Trickshot Multiplayer Framework
nodes.rationale: Transport-agnostic netcode running over three interchangeable transports behind one interface; game code does not change between transports.

nodes.label: Host-authoritative model
nodes.rationale: One player (host) runs the physics/ragdoll sim; clients send input per tick and interpolate toward world snapshots. Chosen as the only sane model for a ragdoll-physics game because deterministic lockstep across machines is not realistic with PhysX ragdolls.

nodes.label: NetSession.cs (host-authoritative session)
nodes.rationale: Owns the slot table, routes messages, exposes per-slot input (host) and latest snapshot (client). Does not run the sim itself.

nodes.label: DirectIpTransport.cs (direct-IP UDP)
nodes.rationale: Background receive thread into a ConcurrentQueue drained on the main thread in Poll; reliability layer on Reliable channel, raw UDP on Unreliable; keepalive + 5s timeout for disconnect detection.

nodes.label: ReliableChannel.cs
nodes.rationale: Per-peer seq / cumulative-ack / resend-until-acked + in-order reorder buffer + dedup, for the Reliable channel only (lobby/roster/score/replay).

nodes.label: NetEndpoint.cs
nodes.rationale: Encodes an IPv4 ip:port into the ulong Join handle so Join(ulong) is unchanged; parses typed addresses and lists the host's local IPv4s for the lobby.

nodes.label: SteamTransport.cs (Steam P2P stub)
nodes.rationale: Real calls gated behind TRICKSHOT_STEAM define symbol; no-op without the SDK. Takes transport priority when built.

nodes.label: Multiplayer.cs (global entry)
nodes.rationale: Transport priority: Steam (if TRICKSHOT_STEAM) then direct-IP then loopback. Multiplayer.Session is null in single-player.

nodes.label: Slot / role model (NetSession.MaxSlots=8)
nodes.rationale: Slot 0 = keeper, slots 1..6 = shooters (strikers), slot 7 = crosser. Humans auto-fill the lowest free shooter slot; unfilled slots become AI.

nodes.label: Direct-IP UDP transport path (LAN / Tailscale)
nodes.rationale: Play-with-friends-without-Steam path: host PC is the authoritative server, no rented server, join by host IP on UDP port 7777; remote friends tunnel via Tailscale virtual LAN.
